response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with over a decade of full-stack development experience, strongly aligning with the TypeScript, Node.js, and React requirements. He possesses the niche AI-agent development experience requested, along with a solid foundation in cloud infrastructure, containerization, and software testing. While he lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest, his extensive background in building custom test runners and working with various Node.js frameworks makes him an exceptionally strong candidate for this Senior Fullstack Developer role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack expertise utilizing TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB.
Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Strong software craftsmanship background with deep knowledge of TDD, CI/CD, and cloud deployments (AWS, Kubernetes).
concerns: Lacks explicit experience with Nest.js and Vitest, which are part of the primary stack.
Deep involvement in building custom frameworks and utilizing niche languages (e.g., DLang) might indicate a preference outside standard enterprise tooling.
Ongoing concurrent role as a founder of an open-source platform could potentially compete for time and focus.
